mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_vectors (id, product_name, product_code, specification, vector, metadata, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{productName}, #{productCode}, #{specification}, #{vector, typeHandler=com.bjdx.rice.business.mapper.handler.FloatArrayTypeHandler}, #{metadata}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE product_name = #{productName}, product_code = #{productCode}, specification = #{specification}, vector = #{vector, typeHandler=com.bjdx.rice.business.mapper.handler.FloatArrayTypeHandler}, metadata = #{metadata}, updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO product_vectors (id, product_name, product_code, specification, vector, metadata, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productCode}, #{item.specification}, #{item.vector, typeHandler=com.bjdx.rice.business.mapper.handler.FloatArrayTypeHandler}, #{item.metadata}, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE product_name = VALUES(product_name), product_code = VALUES(product_code), specification = VALUES(specification), vector = VALUES(vector), metadata = VALUES(metadata), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_name, product_code, specification, vector, metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM product_vectors ORDER BY id LIMIT #{topK}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM product_vectors WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_name, product_code, specification, vector, metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM product_vectors
